description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named FBGEMM_GPU-CPU Release Build that builds and publishes FBGEMM_GPU-CPU release builds against PyTorch-CPU Release to public PyPI. The workflow triggers on pull requests, push events, and manual workflow dispatches. It uses Amazon Linux containers on CPU hosts, sets up Miniconda, installs dependencies, builds FBGEMM_GPU, and uploads artifacts to GHA or PyPI.
